seoTitle: Murgon vs Murray — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Murgon and Murray. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murgon and Murray.
heading: Murgon vs Murray — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murgon, Queensland and Murray, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murray has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Murgon (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murgon or Murray safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murgon has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Murray scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murgon scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Murray scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murgon or Murray?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murray has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
